title: Abracadabra - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Liquidation loophole exploited to drain GMX-linked pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows funds and pushes a position into liquidation within the same transaction.

red_flags: Funds bridged from Arbitrum to Ethereum
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT BORROWS FUNDS AND PUSHES A POSITION INTO LIQUIDATION WITHIN THE SAME TRANSACTION
summary: Attackers exploited a liquidation loophole by failing deposits and pushing positions into liquidation, draining GMX-linked pools of 6,260 ETH worth approximately $13 million. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing any borrow and liquidate sequence in a single transaction.
